Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import paramiko, time

client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\('46.202.197.167', port=65002, username='u310164365', password='#sshR3mote', timeout=20\)

# Use invoke_shell for a more stable session
shell = client.invoke_shell\(\)
time.sleep\(2\)

def run\(cmd\):
    shell.send\(cmd + '\\n'\)
    time.sleep\(2\)
    out = ''
    while shell.recv_ready\(\):
        out += shell.recv\(4096\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    return out

print\(run\('pwd'\)\)
print\(run\('ls -la'\)\)
print\(run\('find ~ -maxdepth 6 -name ".env" 2>/dev/null'\)\)
print\(run\('find ~ -maxdepth 8 -name "*.db" 2>/dev/null'\)\)
print\(run\('find ~ -maxdepth 6 -name "server.js" 2>/dev/null | head -5'\)\)

client.close\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import paramiko, time

transport = paramiko.Transport\(\('46.202.197.167', 65002\)\)
transport.start_client\(\)
transport.auth_password\('u310164365', '#sshR3mote'\)
time.sleep\(2\)
print\("Auth:", transport.is_authenticated\(\), "Active:", transport.is_active\(\)\)

# Try SFTP \(Hostinger might only allow SFTP\)
try:
    sftp = transport.open_sftp_client\(\)
    print\("SFTP connected!"\)
    
    # List home
    items = sftp.listdir_attr\('.'\)
    for item in items:
        print\(f"  {item.filename}"\)
    
    # Try to find and read .env
    print\("\\n=== Looking for .env ==="\)
    def find_env\(base, depth=0\):
        if depth > 3:
            return
        try:
            for item in sftp.listdir\(base\):
                path = base + '/' + item if base != '.' else item
                if item == '.env':
                    print\(f"Found: {path}"\)
                    try:
                        with sftp.open\(path\) as f:
                            print\(f.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
                    except: pass
                elif not item.startswith\('.'\) and depth < 2:
                    try:
                        find_env\(path, depth+1\)
                    except: pass
        except: pass
    
    find_env\('.'\)
    sftp.close\(\)
except Exception as e:
    print\("SFTP error:", e\)

transport.close\(\)
PYEOF)

if '.env' in items:

import paramiko, time, socket, threading

sock = socket.create_connection\(\('46.202.197.167', 65002\), timeout=20\)
transport = paramiko.Transport\(sock\)
transport.start_client\(timeout=20\)
print\("Server version:", transport.remote_version\)

# Try keyboard-interactive
def handler\(title, instructions, prompt_list\):
    print\(f"Title: {title}, Instructions: {instructions}"\)
    answers = []
    for prompt, echo in prompt_list:
        print\(f"Prompt: {prompt!r}"\)
        answers.append\('Fr3ted2025#2025'\)
    return answers

try:
    transport.auth_interactive\('u310164365', handler\)
    print\("Interactive auth:", transport.is_authenticated\(\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\("Interactive failed:", e\)
    try:
        transport.auth_password\('u310164365', 'Fr3ted2025#2025'\)
        print\("Password auth:", transport.is_authenticated\(\)\)
    except Exception as e2:
        print\("Password failed:", e2\)

time.sleep\(2\)
print\("Final state - Auth:", transport.is_authenticated\(\), "Active:", transport.is_active\(\)\)
transport.close\(\)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import paramiko, time, socket

sock = socket.create_connection\(\('46.202.197.167', 65002\), timeout=20\)
transport = paramiko.Transport\(sock\)
transport.start_client\(timeout=20\)

transport.auth_password\('u310164365', 'Fr3ted2025#2025'\)
# No sleep — open channel immediately
print\("Auth:", transport.is_authenticated\(\), "Active:", transport.is_active\(\)\)

try:
    chan = transport.open_session\(timeout=10\)
    chan.get_pty\(\)  # Request a PTY
    chan.exec_command\('id; pwd; ls -la; find . -name ".env" 2>/dev/null | head -10; find . -name "*.db" 2>/dev/null | head -10'\)
    
    output = b''
    chan.settimeout\(10\)
    try:
        while True:
            chunk = chan.recv\(4096\)
            if not chunk:
                break
            output += chunk
    except:
        pass
    print\(output.decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\("Error:", e\)

transport.close\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import paramiko, time, socket

sock = socket.create_connection\(\('46.202.197.167', 65002\), timeout=20\)
transport = paramiko.Transport\(sock\)
transport.start_client\(timeout=20\)
transport.auth_password\('u310164365', 'Fr3ted2025#2025'\)

print\("Auth:", transport.is_authenticated\(\)\)

try:
    chan = transport.open_session\(timeout=10\)
    print\("Channel:", chan\)
    # Try shell instead of exec
    chan.get_pty\(term='vt100', width=200, height=50\)
    chan.invoke_shell\(\)
    
    time.sleep\(2\)
    # Send command
    chan.send\('pwd\\n'\)
    time.sleep\(1\)
    chan.send\('ls -la\\n'\)
    time.sleep\(1\)
    chan.send\('cat .env 2>/dev/null || echo NO_ENV_HERE\\n'\)
    time.sleep\(1\)
    chan.send\('find ~ -maxdepth 5 -name ".env" 2>/dev/null\\n'\)
    time.sleep\(2\)
    
    output = b''
    chan.settimeout\(3\)
    try:
        while True:
            chunk = chan.recv\(8192\)
            if not chunk:
                break
            output += chunk
    except:
        pass
    print\(output.decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"Error \({type\(e\).__name__}\): {e}"\)

transport.close\(\)
PYEOF)
